csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEngine.SceneManagement; public class Script { public static string Main() { EditorCheck(); return Check(); } static void EditorCheck() { UnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.OpenScene("Assets/Scenes/Level01.unity"); } static string Check() { var scene = SceneManager.GetActiveScene(); var roots = scene.GetRootGameObjects(); string r = ""; foreach (var go in roots) { r += go.name; var sr = go.GetComponent<SpriteRenderer>(); if (sr != null) r += " [SR: sprite=" + (sr.sprite != null ? sr.sprite.name : "null") + "]"; r += " | "; } return r; } }
